name: deepdive-content-pipeline-rehearsal
description: Dev/test tooling for the offline single-file interview trainer. The shipped deliverable is zero-dependency and self-contained; this package exists ONLY so THE GATE's browser checks (render / entity_leak / e2e_interactions) can run via Playwright locally and in CI.

scripts.e2e: node test/render.cjs && node test/entity_leak.cjs && node test/e2e_interactions.cjs
